outline.caption: Elevate your VA School Certifying Official role with VASCO Assistant Pro. Streamline certification, ensure compliance, and support student veterans. Ready to try? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Enhance Student Success' slide could benefit from a more concise headline to maintain the visual hierarchy and ensure it stands out.
